title: Food Services Service Crew
description:
Application Mode

  • Apply by Whatsapp +65 8522 9666

Reporting Structure: Section-in-charge

Job Responsibilities:

1. FOOD RUNNER

  • Serve food and beverages to customers
  • Accountable for the smooth running of designated area
  • Ensure visual quality of all food and beverages items served is according to company’s standards
  • Provide a courteous and professional service at all times
  • Ensure that cleanliness and hygiene is followed throughout

2. DINING AREA

  • Clearing of used soiled cutleries from diner’s table (cutlery collection)
  • Arrange table settings of crockeries and cutleries according to company’s standards
  • Cleaning duties at service area including:Cleaning of table, chairs sofa seats and baby chair

3. PRE-OPENING PREPARATION

  • Perform a range of duties according to outlet’s specification, including:Wiping tables, setting up of tables and ensuring tables have the correct cutleries and table settings
    Preparing and topping up of condiments (e.g. ginger, vinegar, chili sauce)
    Topping up of beverages and preparing tea
    Assist in stock ordering
    Preparing ingredients, check dessert quantity and expiration in the morning to report to supervisor

4. WASHING

  • Tidy up workstations, wash tea and ice buckets, water kettle, utensils, etc
  • To perform daily, weekly and monthly cleaning routine according to outlet’s specification

Educational Qualification/ Experience / Skills and Competencies Requirements:

  • Candidate must possess at least Diploma/Bachelor's Degree in any field

postedCompany.description:
鼎泰豐 DIN TAI FUNG
Awarded one Michelin Star and ranked as one of the world's Top Ten Best Restaurants by The New York Times, the celebrated restaurant has roots dating back to Taiwan 40 years ago. With our famous signature Xiao Long Bao (Steamed Pork Dumplings) and Steamed Chicken Soup, this authentic Taiwanese restaurant makes waves with branches across the world.

Along with the distinguished culinary culture, Din Tai Fung's legendary brand name has built a reputation based on its exquisite Xiao Long Bao's 18 intricate folds. Presenting each piece as a work of art, Din Tai Fung has built a loyal clientele of discerning diners, testimony to our dedication of maintaining, if not exceeding, the demanding standards of this world-class brand.
postedCompany.name: TASTER FOOD PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D19 Serangoon Garden, Hougang, Sengkang, Punggol
